item.title: APT42: Iran-Backed Advanced Threat Operations
item.description: In the cybersecurity world, some advanced persistent threats (APTs) leak data, crash systems, and leave traces behind. But some are silent — roaming a network undetected for months without a single alarm, exfiltrating data and observing their target’s behavior.

item.title: Next-Generation Cyber Traps: Fake AI-Themed Websites
item.description: AI technologies draw more interest every day. Some use them for homework, some for recipes, some to make money at work. As this interest grows, so does the number of people weaponizing it against others.
